questionHtml:
What information is provided by 1H NMR, MS and IR for an organic compound?

I.   1H NMR: chemical environment(s) of protons
II.  MS: fragmentation pattern
III. IR: types of functional group

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III
